data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_WeakWillGrowStro: Even if a POKéMON is weak now,\nit will grow stronger.\pThe most important thing is love!\nLove for your POKéMON!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_RepelIsUseful: Do you use REPEL?\nIt keeps POKéMON away, so it's\luseful when you're in a hurry.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_TakeSomeAntidote: Do you have any ANTIDOTES with\nyou?\pIf you walk around with a poisoned\nPOKéMON, it will lose HP until it faints.\lTake some ANTIDOTES with you.
